code: @Manual{,   title = {exoplanets: Exoplanet Datasets for Teaching Introductory Statistics},   author = {Chester Ismay},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://github.com/moderndive/exoplanets}, }

title: exoplanets
text: Tidied datasets confirmed exoplanets host stars, retrieved NASA’s Exoplanet Archive via REXoplanets package. Column names simplified classroom use, units baked names ambiguous. Intended companion dataset moderndive textbook.

title: exoplanets
code: library(exoplanets)  # One row per confirmed exoplanet (host-star parameters merged in) planets  # Reference-level stellar parameters (many rows per host star) stars

code: system.file("extdata", "data_dictionary_planets.csv", package = "exoplanets") system.file("extdata", "data_dictionary_stars.csv",   package = "exoplanets") system.file("extdata", "data_dictionary.md",          package = "exoplanets")

title: exoplanets: Exoplanet Datasets for Teaching Introductory Statistics — exoplanets-package
Confirmed Exoplanets — planets
text: One row per confirmed exoplanet NASA's Exoplanet Archive Planetary Systems Composite Parameters (pscomppars) table. row carries archive's best composite parameter values, planet's host star properties already merged . Column names simplified classroom use; original NASA short name column listed archive_name field data dictionary (system.file("extdata", "data_dictionary_planets.csv", package = "exoplanets")).

title: Confirmed Exoplanets — planets
text: data frame 6278 rows 28 variables: planet_name (character) Planet name commonly used literature. host_name (character) Stellar name commonly used literature. n_stars (numeric) Number gravitationally bound stars planetary system. n_planets (numeric) Number confirmed planets planetary system. discovery_method (factor) Method planet first identified (e.g. Transit, Radial Velocity). discovery_year (integer) Year planet discovered. discovery_facility (character) Name facility making discovery observations. orbital_period_days (numeric, days) Time planet takes complete one orbit around host (system). semi_major_axis_au (numeric, au) Longest radius elliptic orbit; microlensing/imaging detections, projected sky-plane separation. eccentricity (numeric) Amount orbit deviates perfect circle (0 = circular). inclination_deg (numeric, deg) Angle orbit plane relative plane perpendicular Earth's line sight. radius_earth (numeric, Earth radii) Planet radius measured units Earth's radius. radius_jupiter (numeric, Jupiter radii) Planet radius measured units Jupiter's radius. mass_earth (numeric, Earth masses) Best mass estimate (Mass, M*sin()/sin(), M*sin()) Earth masses. mass_jupiter (numeric, Jupiter masses) Best mass estimate (Mass, M*sin()/sin(), M*sin()) Jupiter masses. density_g_cm3 (numeric, g/cm^3) Planet mass per unit volume. eq_temp_k (numeric, K) Equilibrium temperature assuming black-body planet heated host star. insolation_earth (numeric, Earth flux) Stellar flux planet relative Earth's solar flux. star_spec_type (character) Morgan-Keenan spectral classification host star. star_temp_k (numeric, K) Black-body temperature emitting total electromagnetic radiation star. star_radius_solar (numeric, Solar radii) Stellar radius units Sun's radius. star_mass_solar (numeric, Solar masses) Stellar mass units Sun's mass. star_metallicity_dex (numeric, dex) Metal content stellar photosphere relative hydrogen. star_log_g (numeric, log10(cm/s^2)) Gravitational acceleration stellar surface (log10). star_age_gyr (numeric, Gyr) Age host star billions years. ra_deg (numeric, deg) Right ascension planetary system decimal degrees. dec_deg (numeric, deg) Declination planetary system decimal degrees. distance_pc (numeric, pc) Distance planetary system parsecs.

title: Confirmed Exoplanets — planets
text: NASA Exoplanet Archive Planetary Systems columns documentation:   https://exoplanetarchive.ipac.caltech.edu/docs/API_PS_columns.html.   Retrieved via REXoplanets package.

title: Stellar Hosts (Reference-Level) — stars
text: Reference-level stellar parameter data NASA's Exoplanet Archive stellarhosts table. Unlike planets, table contains MANY rows per host star (one per published parameter solution), right table studying spread published values single star one-row-per-star analyses. introductory analyses, host star's "best" parameters already merged planets - reach stars need uncertainties, alternative solutions, full photometry.

title: Stellar Hosts (Reference-Level) — stars
text: data frame 47558 rows 134 variables: host_name (character) Stellar name commonly used literature. hd_id (character) Henry Draper Catalog identifier. hip_id (character) Hipparcos Catalog identifier. tic_id (character) TESS Input Catalog identifier. ra_deg (numeric, deg) Right ascension planetary system decimal degrees. ra_sexagesimal (character) Right ascension sexagesimal hh:mm:ss notation. dec_deg (numeric, deg) Declination planetary system decimal degrees. dec_sexagesimal (character) Declination sexagesimal dd:mm:ss notation. galactic_lon_deg (numeric, deg) Galactic longitude planetary system. galactic_lat_deg (numeric, deg) Galactic latitude planetary system. ecliptic_lon_deg (numeric, deg) Ecliptic longitude planetary system. ecliptic_lat_deg (numeric, deg) Ecliptic latitude planetary system. mag_i_cousins (logical, mag) Apparent brightness (Cousins) band. mag_i_cousins_upper_err (logical, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_icmag. mag_i_cousins_lower_err (logical, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_icmag. temperature_k (numeric, K) Black-body temperature emitting total electromagnetic radiation star. temperature_k_upper_err (numeric, K) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty st_teff. temperature_k_lower_err (numeric, K) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty st_teff. temperature_k_limit_flag (numeric) Limit flag st_teff: 1 = upper limit, -1 = lower limit, 0 = measured value. metallicity_dex (numeric, dex) Metal content stellar photosphere relative hydrogen. metallicity_dex_upper_err (numeric, dex) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty st_met. metallicity_dex_lower_err (numeric, dex) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty st_met. metallicity_dex_limit_flag (numeric) Limit flag st_met: 1 = upper limit, -1 = lower limit, 0 = measured value. radial_velocity_km_s (numeric, km/s) Star's velocity along line sight Earth. radial_velocity_km_s_upper_err (numeric, km/s) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty st_radv. radial_velocity_km_s_lower_err (numeric, km/s) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty st_radv. radial_velocity_km_s_limit_flag (numeric) Limit flag st_radv: 1 = upper limit, -1 = lower limit, 0 = measured value. v_sin_i_km_s (numeric, km/s) Equatorial rotational velocity multiplied sin(inclination). v_sin_i_km_s_upper_err (numeric, km/s) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty st_vsin. v_sin_i_km_s_lower_err (numeric, km/s) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty st_vsin. v_sin_i_km_s_limit_flag (numeric) Limit flag st_vsin: 1 = upper limit, -1 = lower limit, 0 = measured value. luminosity_log_solar (numeric, log10(L_sun)) Energy emitted per unit time, solar luminosities (log10). luminosity_log_solar_upper_err (numeric, log10(L_sun)) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty st_lum. luminosity_log_solar_lower_err (numeric, log10(L_sun)) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty st_lum. luminosity_log_solar_limit_flag (numeric) Limit flag st_lum: 1 = upper limit, -1 = lower limit, 0 = measured value. log_g (numeric, log10(cm/s^2)) Gravitational acceleration stellar surface (log10). log_g_upper_err (numeric, log10(cm/s^2)) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty st_logg. log_g_lower_err (numeric, log10(cm/s^2)) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty st_logg. log_g_limit_flag (numeric) Limit flag st_logg: 1 = upper limit, -1 = lower limit, 0 = measured value. age_gyr (numeric, Gyr) Age host star billions years. age_gyr_upper_err (numeric, Gyr) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty st_age. age_gyr_lower_err (numeric, Gyr) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty st_age. age_gyr_limit_flag (numeric) Limit flag st_age: 1 = upper limit, -1 = lower limit, 0 = measured value. mass_solar (numeric, Solar masses) Stellar mass units Sun's mass. mass_solar_upper_err (numeric, Solar masses) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty st_mass. mass_solar_lower_err (numeric, Solar masses) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty st_mass. mass_solar_limit_flag (numeric) Limit flag st_mass: 1 = upper limit, -1 = lower limit, 0 = measured value. density_g_cm3 (numeric, g/cm^3) Stellar mass per unit volume. density_g_cm3_upper_err (numeric, g/cm^3) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty st_dens. density_g_cm3_lower_err (numeric, g/cm^3) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty st_dens. density_g_cm3_limit_flag (numeric) Limit flag st_dens: 1 = upper limit, -1 = lower limit, 0 = measured value. radius_solar (numeric, Solar radii) Stellar radius units Sun's radius. radius_solar_upper_err (numeric, Solar radii) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty st_rad. radius_solar_lower_err (numeric, Solar radii) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty st_rad. radius_solar_limit_flag (numeric) Limit flag st_rad: 1 = upper limit, -1 = lower limit, 0 = measured value. n_stars (numeric) Number gravitationally bound stars planetary system. n_planets (numeric) Number confirmed planets planetary system. n_moons (numeric) Number confirmed moons planetary system. proper_motion_total_mas_yr (numeric, mas/yr) Total angular change position time relative Solar System barycenter. proper_motion_total_mas_yr_upper_err (numeric, mas/yr) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_pm. proper_motion_total_mas_yr_lower_err (numeric, mas/yr) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_pm. proper_motion_ra_mas_yr (numeric, mas/yr) Proper motion right ascension. proper_motion_ra_mas_yr_upper_err (numeric, mas/yr) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_pmra. proper_motion_ra_mas_yr_lower_err (numeric, mas/yr) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_pmra. proper_motion_dec_mas_yr (numeric, mas/yr) Proper motion declination. proper_motion_dec_mas_yr_upper_err (numeric, mas/yr) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_pmdec. proper_motion_dec_mas_yr_lower_err (numeric, mas/yr) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_pmdec. parallax_mas (numeric, mas) Annual parallax system. parallax_mas_upper_err (numeric, mas) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_plx. parallax_mas_lower_err (numeric, mas) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_plx. distance_pc (numeric, pc) Distance planetary system parsecs. distance_pc_upper_err (numeric, pc) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_dist. distance_pc_lower_err (numeric, pc) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_dist. mag_b_johnson (numeric, mag) Apparent brightness B (Johnson) photometric band. mag_b_johnson_upper_err (numeric, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_bmag. mag_b_johnson_lower_err (numeric, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_bmag. mag_v_johnson (numeric, mag) Apparent brightness V (Johnson) photometric band. mag_v_johnson_upper_err (numeric, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_vmag. mag_v_johnson_lower_err (numeric, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_vmag. mag_j_2mass (numeric, mag) Apparent brightness 2MASS J band. mag_j_2mass_upper_err (numeric, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_jmag. mag_j_2mass_lower_err (numeric, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_jmag. mag_h_2mass (numeric, mag) Apparent brightness 2MASS H band. mag_h_2mass_upper_err (numeric, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_hmag. mag_h_2mass_lower_err (numeric, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_hmag. mag_k_2mass (numeric, mag) Apparent brightness 2MASS Ks band. mag_k_2mass_upper_err (numeric, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_kmag. mag_k_2mass_lower_err (numeric, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_kmag. mag_u_sloan (numeric, mag) Apparent brightness SDSS u band. mag_u_sloan_upper_err (numeric, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_umag. mag_u_sloan_lower_err (numeric, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_umag. mag_r_sloan (numeric, mag) Apparent brightness SDSS r band. mag_r_sloan_upper_err (numeric, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_rmag. mag_r_sloan_lower_err (numeric, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_rmag. mag_i_sloan (numeric, mag) Apparent brightness SDSS band. mag_i_sloan_upper_err (numeric, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_imag. mag_i_sloan_lower_err (numeric, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_imag. mag_z_sloan (numeric, mag) Apparent brightness SDSS z band. mag_z_sloan_upper_err (numeric, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_zmag. mag_z_sloan_lower_err (numeric, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_zmag. mag_w1_wise (numeric, mag) Apparent brightness WISE 3.4 micron band. mag_w1_wise_upper_err (numeric, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_w1mag. mag_w1_wise_lower_err (numeric, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_w1mag. mag_w2_wise (numeric, mag) Apparent brightness WISE 4.6 micron band. mag_w2_wise_upper_err (numeric, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_w2mag. mag_w2_wise_lower_err (numeric, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_w2mag. mag_w3_wise (numeric, mag) Apparent brightness WISE 12 micron band. mag_w3_wise_upper_err (numeric, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_w3mag. mag_w3_wise_lower_err (numeric, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_w3mag. mag_w4_wise (numeric, mag) Apparent brightness WISE 22 micron band. mag_w4_wise_upper_err (numeric, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_w4mag. mag_w4_wise_lower_err (numeric, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_w4mag. mag_g_sloan (numeric, mag) Apparent brightness SDSS g band. mag_g_sloan_upper_err (numeric, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_gmag. mag_g_sloan_lower_err (numeric, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_gmag. mag_gaia (numeric, mag) Apparent brightness Gaia G band. mag_gaia_upper_err (numeric, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_gaiamag. mag_gaia_lower_err (numeric, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_gaiamag. mag_tess (numeric, mag) Apparent brightness TESS bandpass. mag_tess_upper_err (numeric, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_tmag. mag_tess_lower_err (numeric, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_tmag. system_name (character) Name system star belongs . metallicity_ratio (character) Ratio used express metallicity (e.g. [Fe/H], [M/H]). spectral_type (character) Morgan-Keenan spectral classification star. mag_kepler (numeric, mag) Apparent brightness Kepler bandpass. mag_kepler_upper_err (logical, mag) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_kepmag. mag_kepler_lower_err (logical, mag) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty sy_kepmag. rotation_period_days (numeric, days) Time required one full rotation (assuming solid-body rotation). rotation_period_days_upper_err (numeric, days) Upper (positive) 1-sigma uncertainty st_rotp. rotation_period_days_lower_err (numeric, days) Lower (negative) 1-sigma uncertainty st_rotp. rotation_period_days_limit_flag (numeric) Limit flag st_rotp: 1 = upper limit, -1 = lower limit, 0 = measured value. gaia_dr2_id (character) Gaia Data Release 2 identifier. gaia_dr3_id (character) Gaia Data Release 3 identifier. circumbinary_flag (numeric) 1 planet orbits binary system, 0 otherwise.

title: Stellar Hosts (Reference-Level) — stars
text: NASA Exoplanet Archive Stellar Hosts columns documentation:   https://exoplanetarchive.ipac.caltech.edu/docs/API_STELLARHOSTS_columns.html.   Retrieved via REXoplanets package.

title: Stellar Hosts (Reference-Level) — stars
text: Many columns follow base + suffix convention: <col>_upper_err: upper (+) 1-sigma uncertainty <col> <col>_lower_err: lower (-) 1-sigma uncertainty <col> <col>_limit_flag: limit flag (1 = upper limit, -1 = lower limit, 0 = measured)

title: exoplanets 0.1.0
text: Initial release. planets: one row per confirmed exoplanet Planetary Systems Composite Parameters (pscomppars) table, host-star parameters merged . stars: reference-level stellar host parameters (stellarhosts table) — many rows per star, one per published parameter solution. Column names simplified classroom use units baked names ambiguous. Original NASA short names preserved data dictionaries shipped inst/extdata/.
